revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:旧暦09月]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 六曜を最下段に移動; 理由は[[Template‐ノート:旧暦1月]]に記載

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:旧暦0September]] to [[Template:Old Lunar Calendar0September]]: Text replacement - "旧暦" to "Old Lunar Calendar"

revision.comment: I think this fixes the linkingf
revision.text:

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Old Lunar Calendar September]] to [[Template:Lunar September]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar " to "Lunar "
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Lunar September]] to [[Template:Lunisolar September]]: Text replacement - "Lunar September" to "Lunisolar September"

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:暦表テンプレート]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
doing this because it is quite important for standardization in my corrections system
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Copying from [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] to [[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[ja:Template:旧暦{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
5 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:Template:旧暦9月 up to rev 53020521
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:旧暦9月]] to [[Template:Lunisolar September]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
Moving the </noinclude> to the bottom so it is not transcluded
Bot: remove deleted category Jawiki date templates
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
76 revisions imported: importing the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar templates but renamed so I can fork them for the Islamic calendar
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Islamic September]] to [[Template:Islamic Ramadan]]: Text replacement - "September" to "Ramadan"

Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵↵[[Category:qq]]-->[[Category:Islamic calendar templates]]" to "
[[Category:qq]][[Category:Islamic calendar templates]] </noinclude>"
Text replacement - "|先負↵|仏滅↵|大安↵|赤口↵|先勝↵|友引" to ""
Text replacement - "月 (旧暦)|lt=" to "|comment=I do not know of any abbreviations|qq="
removing the bad interwikis. Translation templates are good to keep but not the interwikis to wrong pages
Bot: sync {{ill}} inter-wikis with master list
Bot: sync {{ill}} inter-wikis with master list

Copying from [[Category:Islamic calendar templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] doing this in the process of adding them into the month categories using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q11000805)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]

Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 5 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
